title: Bhadrachalam Heat Wave
lead: Bhadrachalam is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.66. The event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bhadrachalam are characterized by high temperatures and high humidity, with an umidita of 72%.
The heat wave is expected to continue, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
The low wind speed of 3.3 km/h is exacerbating the heat wave, making it feel even hotter.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave response measures immediately.
